description: Inline label element with color variants (Default, Primary, Success, Danger, Warning, Info), style options (Filled, Outline, Subtle), sizes (Sm, Md), optional pill shape, status dot, and icon.

parameters.name: BadgeStyle
parameters.description: Fill style (Filled / Outline / Subtle). Defaults to Filled.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional icon name shown before child content.

parameters.name: Pill
parameters.description: Renders with fully rounded pill shape.

parameters.name: Dot
parameters.description: Renders a small status dot before the content.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) to apply to the badge.

examples.title: Success badge with dot and pill shape
